introduction.p: Use substitution to solve the system.

statement.p: Isolate one of the variables in one of the equations.

solution.p: We choose to isolate x in the first equation. All we need to do is add 3y to each side, and then x=3y+1\text{.}

statement.p: Substitute the isolated expression into the other equation.
Solve for the one variable that remains.
